designGoal: Apple-like premium dashboard feel aligned with the Applied Intelligence website.

guidance.background: Reduce starry / noisy texture and favor deep navy gradients with subtle glow.
guidance.cards: Use softer rounded cards with cleaner borders and calmer glow.
guidance.buttons: Primary buttons should use the brighter website blue. Secondary buttons should stay darker and more muted.
guidance.typography: Use strong headers with calmer gray-blue body text.
guidance.dashboard: Preserve dashboard structure but make panels cleaner and easier to scan.
guidance.analytics: Make analytics feel like a premium extension of the home dashboard, not a spreadsheet wall.
